screens.prompt:
Title: Lucas Santana Mobile Portfolio 2026
Context: Mobile adaptation of Lucas Santana's 2026 premium software engineer portfolio.
Description of the screen: A mobile-first, neo-dark editorial portfolio page. It features a dark graphite base with cyan signal accents and amber highlights. The hero section displays an oversized 'LUCAS SANTANA' name lockup with a glowing circular profile frame. Metric cards for '08+ Years' and '50M+ Users' use large, glowing numerals with a subtle blur effect. Project highlights are presented in a horizontal swipe-style carousel with parallax image plates. The 'Deep Dive' section uses compact summaries and a vertical timeline with milestone markers. The contact CTA is a high-contrast, full-width block with a large amber arrow icon. The design implies motion with alternating directional reveals and count-up animations for the metrics. Typography is bold and highly legible, maintaining a premium tech-editorial feel.
Platform: ios
Form factor: phone
screens.title: Lucas Santana Mobile Portfolio 2026

outputComponents.text:
The mobile design for Lucas Santana's 2026 Portfolio has been created to maintain the premium, neo-dark editorial look:

- **Lucas Santana Mobile Portfolio**: This mobile-first screen features a stacked, high-impact layout with glowing profile accents, a horizontal swipe project carousel, and bold metric cards designed for count-up animations.

Would you like to see a detail page for one of the projects or perhaps add a section for "Tech Stack" logos in a horizontal marquee?

outputComponents.suggestion: Design a horizontal marquee for "Tech Stack" icons.
Create a "Case Study Detail" mobile screen.
Add an "About Me" narrative section with a timeline.
